summary: Full backend + frontend testing of Şakarlar SW warehouse app with 45 temizlik/ambalaj products, category filters, fuzzy search, speed mode, scanner, admin panel and CRUD.

integration_issues.issue: Admin panel loads total count (45) but does NOT display temizlik (25) / ambalaj (20) breakdown from /api/stats. The API returns these values but admin/index.tsx only uses data.total_products.

action_items: OPTIONAL: Show temizlik/ambalaj count breakdown in admin panel stats card (API already returns it, just not rendered)
critical_code_review_comments: admin/index.tsx Product interface is missing 'category' field - won't cause runtime error but is incomplete typing
Seed logic re-seeds if count==0 OR if sample lacks 'category'. After first valid seed this works fine.

success_rate.frontend: 95% - all screens load and interact correctly; admin stats only shows total count not category breakdown

seed_data_creation: 45 products seeded on startup (25 temizlik + 20 ambalaj). No food products. Verified via API.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features working: category filter (Tümü/Temizlik/Ambalaj), fuzzy search with Turkish chars, speed mode toggle, scan navigation, product detail with large price, admin CRUD with category picker. Backend 100% passing. Minor: admin panel doesn't show temizlik/ambalaj count breakdown.
rca_of_issue: Admin stats card calls /api/stats which returns {total_products, temizlik, ambalaj} but admin/index.tsx line 59 only stores data.total_products. temizlik/ambalaj counts not wired to state. Fix: add state for temizlik/ambalaj counts and render them.
